channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How to watch Crystal Palace vs Manchester United: live stream Premier League 2025/26 game, TV channels, preview
item.description: All the ways to watch Crystal Palace vs Manchester United live streams online and from anywhere as the Eagles look to inflict another loss on United.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Back, TechRadar

item.title: Want to save money on an Apple iPhone this holiday season? Try these 3 shopping hacks
item.description: Thanksgiving is behind us, which means the holiday shopping season has officially begun. And that means that both companies and third-party retailers will spend every day between now and Christmas morning trying to get you to spend your consumer dollars with them.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: How to watch WWE Survivor Series 2025: War Games with this 75% off Black Friday deal
item.description: All the ways to watch WWE Survivor Series 2025 live streams online, with John Cena, CM Punk, Roman Reigns and Brock Lesnar in WarGames action at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Adam Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: Everything new on Disney+ in December 2025: Percy Jackson season 2, Taylor Swift: The End of an Era, and more
item.description: From new Taylor Swift's The Eras Tour projects to Percy Jackson's return, here's what's on Disney+ this month.
item.dc:creator: Tom Power, TechRadar

item.title: Infosys co-founder once again calls for longer than 70-hour weeks - and no, he's not joking
item.description: Infosys co-founder Narayana Murthy advocates 72-hour work weeks, despite global studies showing shorter schedules improve productivity and employee wellbeing.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: Lawsuit: Meta allowed sex-trafficking posts on Instagram as it put profit over kids’ safety
item.description: 'Meta allowed its products to infiltrate classrooms, disrupt learning environments, and contribute directly to the youth mental health crisis,' lawsuit claims.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: New Android malware can empty your bank account in seconds
item.description: New Android malware BankBot YNRK silences phones, steals banking data and drains crypto wallets automatically. Learn how this advanced threat works.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Agentic cloud ops with the new Azure Copilot
item.description: Microsoft unveiled its awkwardly named Copilot in Azure back in 2024. That was followed by the Azure Model Context Protocol Server, called from the GitHub Copilot agent in Visual Studio Code.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: What comes next for federal workers after AI takes over the mundane tasks
item.description: "Who is going to leverage the proper tools out there to accomplish the job in the most efficient, effective and cost-based area? That's key," Bob Venero said. The post What comes next for federal workers after AI takes over the mundane tasks first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Here’s why Gen Z is obsessed with the humble quarter zip
item.description: It’s long been the uniform of management consultants and finance bros, but now the humble quarter zip is being embraced by a rather unexpected demographic. ​​Over the past few weeks, FYPs have become dominated by the workwear staple.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: HP to slash up to 6,000 jobs as component costs and AI reshape operations
item.description: HP announced plans to eliminate between 4,000 and 6,000 positions by 2028 as part of what it described as an AI-driven transformation to save $1 billion, while warning that surging memory chip costs would squeeze margins in the second half of 2026.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: HP to slash up to 6,000 jobs as component costs and AI reshape operations
item.description: HP announced plans to eliminate between 4,000 and 6,000 positions by 2028 as part of what it described as an AI-driven transformation to save $1 billion, while warning that surging memory chip costs would squeeze margins in the second half of 2026.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How restaurant reservation platform OpenTable tracks customer dining habits
item.description: OpenTable now uses AI to track your dining habits and share insights with restaurants. Learn what data they collect and how to protect your privacy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What is Edge AI? When the cloud isn’t close enough
item.description: What is edge AI? Edge AI is a form of artificial intelligence that in part runs on local hardware rather than in a central data center or on cloud servers.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Inside the Trump administration’s dicey play to block states from regulating AI
item.description: Spurred to action by tech industry lobbyists and insiders, Republicans in the Senate appear to be planning to add language to the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) that would preempt states from passing laws regulating AI labs.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Boeing’s troubled Starliner won’t carry astronauts on its next mission
item.description: Boeing and NASA have agreed to keep astronauts off the company’s next Starliner flight and instead perform a trial run with cargo to prove its safety. Monday’s announcement comes eight months after the first and only Starliner crew returned to Earth aboard SpaceX after a prolonged mission.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: A new center aims to modernize federal lending at a scale few realize exists
item.description: "If we're successful, our work will help enhance taxpayer value, importantly, by reducing wasteful spending on duplicated systems," Doug Criscitello said. The post A new center aims to modernize federal lending at a scale few realize exists first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude Opus 4.5 pricing cut signals a shift in the enterprise AI market
item.description: Anthropic has launched Claude Opus 4.5 with a 67% price cut that repositions its flagship model from a boutique offering to a production-ready enterprise tool.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Where AI meets cloud-native computing
item.description: In the past decade, we’ve seen two major advances in software development: cloud-native architecture and artificial intelligence. The first redefined how we build, deploy, and manage applications, and the second is becoming a mainstream utility.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google issues warning on fake VPN apps
item.description: Google warns Android users about dangerous fake VPN apps hiding malware that steals passwords, banking details and personal data from phones and tablets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
